_comment: Pinned specifications Melkor implements against. Unlike a code dependency, a spec is pinned
by the exact upstream commit and the SHA-256 of each vendored file, so that a later editorial
or semantic change upstream cannot silently alter Melkor's behaviour. CI verifies the vendored
files against these hashes. Updating a pinned spec follows
docs/maintainers/updating-khr-gaussian-splatting.md and creates a NEW profile ID rather than

specifications.status_note: This is a Khronos release-candidate extension, not a ratified one. Melkor labels its support 'release-candidate' and does not promise that a future revision is source-compatible.
specifications.license: See the KhronosGroup/glTF repository LICENSE; Khronos specification text and schemas are redistributed under their terms with copyright retained.

semantic_decisions.sh_degrees: 0-3 (COEF counts 1/3/5/7 per degree). The canonical Melkor scene stores 0-4; SPZ degree 4 into this profile is LOSS_SH_DEGREE_TRUNCATED, never silent.
semantic_decisions.sh_attributes: KHR_gaussian_splatting:SH_DEGREE_N_COEF_M, accessor type VEC3, component type float.
semantic_decisions.position: POSITION (VEC3); the mean is POSITION combined with the node global transform.
semantic_decisions.opacity: KHR_gaussian_splatting:OPACITY, SCALAR, float or normalized unsigned byte/short. Linear.
semantic_decisions.scale: KHR_gaussian_splatting:SCALE, linear, MUST NOT be negative.
semantic_decisions.rotation: quaternion attribute; glTF component order x,y,z,w.
semantic_decisions.kernel: 'ellipse' is the defined kernel; kernel and colorSpace are REQUIRED.
semantic_decisions.primitive_mode: POINTS (0). The referenced material MUST be ignored for splat rendering unless a further extension says otherwise.

known_open_upstream: PR 2531 KHR_gaussian_splatting_compression_spz (SPZ-in-glTF compression) — affects a future compressed adapter path.
PR 2539 KHR_gaussian_splatting_wide_gamut_color — may add color spaces.
